titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 2718
GA 2718
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Block marker for 8.59 added by David Parker.
χρονον added after μικρον at 13.33 by Rachel Kevern.
Supplied initials added at 12.35, 13.2 by Rachel Kevern.
Supplied initials added at 10.39, 18.12, 19.2 by David Parker.
Tagging and a word break in 19.23 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 2718Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 104rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: ASTranscription begun: 20/12/2011Transcription finished: 28/1/2012 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - No Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 Νo 7.53 - 8.11 No Other remarks: From 124r to125r presence of sign + FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: The first alpha is written above the line, probably either as a ligature or a correction by the first hand
The omicron is written above the line, probably either as a ligature or a correction by the first hand
The correction was probably made in scribendo
This word is missing an initial.
This word is missing an initial.
This word is missing an initial.
The first letter of this word is an ornamental initial letter, probably written because a delta written faintly as a guide was misread by the artist
This word is missing an initial.
This word is missing an initial.
